seo.title: Valentin Alekhin — Senior Full-stack Developer
seo.description: I design and build SaaS, web applications, and internal systems—from idea to launch.

hero.statement: I build web products from idea to launch.
hero.description: I design and build SaaS, web applications, and internal systems—without gaps between design, frontend, and backend.

projects.title: Products built around real workflows
projects.description: Not a gallery of screens, but systems where interface, architecture, and launch work as one.

powersketch.summary: A browser-based service for designing electrical distribution boards.
powersketch.description: PowerSketch turns electrical-panel design into one continuous digital workflow: devices are selected from the catalog, placed on an SVG scene, connected with wires, organized into layers, and carried into reports without re-entering data.
powersketch.audience: The product is built for electricians, smart-home integrators, panel builders, commissioning engineers, and technical teams.
powersketch.challenge: An engineering editor must be precise without feeling heavy. The catalog, device pins, wires, layers, reports, and export all represent one project and must remain consistent after every user action.
powersketch.challengeTitle: Complex domain logic without a heavy desktop interface
powersketch.role: I own the product end to end: workflows, interface and data-model design, frontend, backend, and continued product development after launch.
powersketch.approach: The editor is centered on an independent SVG scene rather than a collection of disconnected screens. A device knows its dimensions and pins, a wire knows its endpoints, and a layer knows order and visibility. One project state therefore drives editing, persistence, reports, and export.
powersketch.architecture: The interactive client is separated from server responsibilities. The backend handles authentication, projects, the device library, public access, and subscriptions, while the UI optimizes frequent canvas operations and synchronizes durable project state.
powersketch.systemTitle: Project data flows through the whole product
powersketch.constraints: The key constraints are large-scene SVG performance, export fidelity, backward compatibility of stored projects, and predictable editor behavior across screen sizes.

workflow.label: Workflow
workflow.title: From an empty project to installation hand-off
workflow.description: The core journey is a sequence of connected operations: each step produces the data required by the next one.

create.title: Create a project
create.description: The workspace brings projects, custom devices, and product updates together.

compose.title: Compose the board
compose.description: Devices are found in a hierarchical catalog and placed on a scalable canvas.

connect.title: Connect the pins
connect.description: Wires link named pins and persist as part of the project structure.

report.title: Generate reports
report.description: Devices and connections become configurable tables ready for field work.

share.title: Hand off the result
share.description: A project can be shared as a view-only link or exported as SVG.

scene.title: SVG scene
scene.description: Zooming, panning, snapping, and editing preserve geometric precision.

catalog.title: Device catalog
catalog.description: Search and hierarchy keep a large library of real components manageable.

layers.title: Project layers
layers.description: Elements can be ordered, hidden, locked, renamed, and grouped.

data.title: Shared state
data.description: Devices, pins, and wires remain the common source for the editor, reports, and export.

customDevices.label: Custom devices
customDevices.title: The catalog can adapt to a real project
customDevices.description: A user can define a device with physical dimensions, a custom image, and named pins with coordinates. The editor accepts PNG, JPG, SVG, and WEBP files up to 5 MB; a missing model can also be proposed for the shared catalog.

reports.label: Reports
reports.title: The scene becomes working tables
reports.description: The device report includes manufacturer, model, parameters, notes, and quantity. The wire report records marking, cross-section, length, source, and destination, with configurable columns before download.

handoff.label: Hand-off
handoff.title: A project can be reviewed without editor access
handoff.description: Public access generates a view-only link that can be renewed. SVG export provides background, paper size, orientation, preview, download, and print controls.

productModel.label: Product model
productModel.title: One editor for different scales of work
productModel.description: Free, Plus, and Professional plans all retain access to the editor and library. Paid tiers expand project, custom-device, and layer limits while adding copying and watermark-free export.

powersketch.resultTitle: A working product, not an interface demonstration
powersketch.result: PowerSketch operates as a complete browser SaaS, from the workspace and a catalog of 2,000 devices to design, reports, public review, SVG export, and subscriptions. This case uses observable product capabilities only, without invented audience, conversion, or revenue figures.

capabilities.title: From an uncertain idea to a working system
capabilities.description: I can own the complete product or a specific layer while keeping user workflows and technical decisions connected.

discovery.title: Discovery / Product
discovery.description: I clarify the problem, constraints, and first-release scope before optimizing delivery.

interface.title: Interface
interface.description: I design interfaces that keep complex domain logic understandable and controllable.

frontend.title: Frontend
frontend.description: I build fast Vue and Nuxt applications with typed logic and accessible interaction.

backend.title: Backend / Integrations
backend.description: I design APIs, integrations, and durable background workflows without unnecessary complexity.

launch.title: Launch
launch.description: I prepare production, observability, and the next product cycle—the work does not end at a local build.

process.title: A transparent process without extra layers
process.description: You communicate directly with the person making product and technical decisions and accountable for the result.

discussion.title: Discussion
discussion.description: We unpack the problem, users, constraints, and what a useful outcome means.

proposal.title: Proposal
proposal.description: I define the solution, scope, stages, timeline, and a suitable engagement model.

development.title: Development
development.description: Work moves in short stages with regular demonstrations and feedback.

launch.title: Launch
launch.description: I verify production scenarios, deploy the product, and stay available after release.

flight.canvasLabel: Arcade game: the aircraft flies and fires automatically while the player moves left and right
flight.intro: Flight and weapons are automatic. Control the course and avoid every collision.

about.title: Interface and architecture are parts of the same decision

paragraphs.product: I work full-stack because product decisions rarely stop at the edge of a layout. Interface state depends on the data model, while a dependable launch depends on architecture and operations.
paragraphs.workflow: I prefer work where I can understand the real workflow, test the direction with a prototype, and carry it through to actual use—not merely hand off files.

principles.interface: I do not separate interface from architecture.
principles.prototype: I prefer a working prototype to a long document.
principles.automation: I automate anything I have to do twice.
principles.launch: A product is only finished after launch.

contact.title: Have a task or a product idea?
contact.description: Tell me what you are building, what already works, and where you need technical help. A short note is enough to begin.
contact.dialogDescription: Choose the easiest way to start the conversation.

editor.title: SVG editor
editor.description: A scalable canvas with device drag-and-drop, snapping, and layer controls.

connections.title: Smart connections
connections.description: Pin-to-pin connections become editable, durable project data.

reports.title: Library & reports
reports.description: Device-library search and connection reports ready for hand-off.

case.nextText: I can help shape the first release or join the next stage of an existing system.
